params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: ChatGLM iter 10 — Vue3/Vuex4 Phase 4 evidence-based 5-event flow. Events: init -> think:init -> think:finish -> tool_calls:finish -> text:finish. All 3 phases (think/tool_calls/text) reach content_status=finish per real success-case state machine. status='finish' (not 'finished') per success-case observation. Each phase has its own logic_id. model=moe_5l.
